title: Trump’s Comments On Students Unlikely To Change Immigration Policy - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Trump’s Comments On Students Unlikely To Change Immigration Policy
Dan Berger was featured in Forbes discussing the growing disconnect between President Trump’s public comments supporting international students and the administration’s evolving immigration policies. Berger highlighted the increasing uncertainty facing Dreamers and international students, pointing to processing delays, heightened enforcement measures, and policy changes that could make studying and working more difficult.
